theme_notes: Drawing from Hegseth's Senate testimony that the US War on Iran has cost $37.5 billion, Conor McGregor's UFC 329 comeback fight against Max Holloway, the Tour de France, and Keir Starmer's resignation as UK Prime Minister.
settled: Zero. The Iran war isn't over, but at least you two are.
All square. McGregor took five years to come back. You didn't need that long.
Even. The Tour de France has more climbs ahead. Your balance does not.
youOwe: Less than one Tour de France energy gel. Someone needs fuel. Not you, apparently.
Smaller than the tariff on a Canadian muffin. Both are equally overdue.
McGregor's comeback is worth millions. This is worth less than his mouthguard.
Enough for a Conor McGregor rematch shirt. Just as embarrassing to be caught with.
Less than the Iran war costs per second. You're losing your own engagement.
Keir Starmer lasted two years before his party turned on him. Tick tock.
McGregor fights Holloway for the second time. You've made this exact mistake before too.
That's the tariff on a nice case of Canadian wine that no longer exists at this price.
Hegseth called the Iran war 'unavoidable.' Your partner might say the same about this.
The US spent $37.5 billion on Iran. You've allocated nothing to the home front.
McGregor vs Holloway II. Your debt vs your dignity. One of them will be finished tonight.
Tour de France climbers suffer for glory. You suffer for nothing. Pay and end it.
Trump levied 50% tariffs on Canada and Canada blinked. Blink.
The Tour de France is 21 stages. Your excuses have run longer.
McGregor came back after five years of silence. Your explanation has been louder and less earned.
Hegseth testified the Iran war cost $37.5 billion. You've built your own theatre of operations.
Seven prime ministers couldn't stabilize the UK. Nothing can stabilize this.
At 50% tariffs, Canada-US trade collapsed. At this number, so should your self-image.
theyOwe: They owe you less than one Tour stage's worth of sunscreen. Still collect it.
That's a McGregor nosebleed ticket stub. It's the principle.
Smaller than the tariff on a Canadian toque. But it's yours.
They owe you what Canada loses per minute under Trump's tariffs. Get there first.
Enough for a ringside livestream of McGregor vs Holloway. You've earned the show.
Keir Starmer resigned over less accountability than this. Take notes.
McGregor earns this per breath in the octagon. They've been breathing on your dime.
Enough to watch a Tour de France mountain stage with actual cheese. You deserve it.
The Iran war has a $37.5B price tag. This is, proportionally, your conflict zone.
They owe you more than a Tour de France team's daily per diem. That team is working.
McGregor waited five years to fight again. You've been patient enough.
Hegseth said $37.5B with a straight face. You cannot be calm about this.
Trump's tariffs disrupted entire supply chains. This is disrupting your supply of goodwill.
The Tour de France peloton moves faster than this repayment. And they're on bikes.
McGregor vs Holloway II. They signed you up for a rematch you didn't agree to.
The US War on Iran cost $37.5 billion. Your partner is financing their own campaign.
At this level, 50% tariffs are a discount. Apply them.
Seven UK prime ministers couldn't survive a crisis this size. Neither should this.
